sections.paragraph:
(cogn. to רָקַק)-

(1) to beat, to strike the earth with the feet, as in indignation, Eze 6:11 in exultation, 25:6 .

(2) to spread out by beating, (see Piel), and simply, to spread out, e.g. God the earth, Psa 136:6 Isa 42:5 44:24 . (Syr. to make firm, to found.)

(3) to tread down, 2Sa 22:43.

Piel, to spread out by beating, as a thin plate, Exo 39:3 Num 17:4 hence to overlay with a thin plate, Isa 40:19.

Pual, part. spread out (with the hammer), Jer 10:9.

Hiphil, i.q. Kal No. 2, to spread out (heaven), Job 37:18.

Derivatives, רָקִיעַ and-
